rows.normalized_rule_text: ADEPTA SORORITAS CHARACTER model only (excluding PENITENT units). (Once per turn, per unit) At the start of a phase, you can use this ability. If you do, select one of the following: Rite of Revelation: While this unit is shooting, enemy units have +6" Detection Range. Sermon of Intolerance: This unit's Battle-shock rolls automatically succeed. Catechism of Raging Fervour: This unit has +1" Move. Psalm of Righteous Smiting: This unit's attacks have +1 Strength. Chorus of Repudiation: Attacks that target this unit with a Strength greater than this unit's Toughness have -1 to wound rolls.
rows.raw_rule_text: ADEPTA SORORITAS CHARACTER model only (excluding PENITENT units). (Once per turn, per unit) At the start of a phase, you can use this ability. If you do, select one of the following: Rite of Revelation: While this unit is shooting, enemy units have +6" detection range. Sermon of Intolerance: This unit's Battle-shock rolls automatically succeed. Catechism of Raging Fervour: This unit has +1" Move. Psalm of Righteous Smiting: This unit's attacks have +1 Strength. Chorus of Repudiation: Attacks that target this unit with a Strength greater than this unit's Toughness have -1 to wound rolls.
rows.timing_descriptor: start of a phase

rows.normalized_rule_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. (Once per battle, per army) When this model is destroyed, at the end of the phase, roll one D6: On a 2+, set up this model on the battlefield, unengaged and as close as possible to where it was destroyed. This model is not part of an Attached unit and its unit has a Starting Strength of 1. This model has 3 wounds remaining.
rows.raw_rule_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES model only. (Once per battle, per army) When this model is destroyed, at the end of the phase, roll one D6: On a 2+, set up this model on the battlefield, unengaged and as close as possible to where it was destroyed. This model is not part of an Attached unit and its unit has a Starting Strength of 1. This model has 3 wounds remaining.
rows.timing_descriptor: end of the phase in which this model was destroyed

rows.normalized_rule_text: WHEN: Your Command phase. TARGET: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA NURGLE unit from your army that is on the battlefield. EFFECT: Return up to 1 destroyed model to your unit (excluding CHARACTER models) or up to D3 destroyed models instead (excluding CHARACTER models) if your unit is a BATTLELINE unit, with their full wounds remaining. If your unit is a MONSTER unit, one model in your unit regains up to D3+1 lost wounds instead.
rows.raw_rule_text: WHEN: Your Command phase. TARGET: One LEGIONES DAEMONICA NURGLE unit from your army that is on the battlefield. EFFECT: Return up to 1 destroyed model to your unit (excluding CHARACTER models) or up to D3 destroyed models instead (excluding CHARACTER models) if your unit is a BATTLELINE unit, with their full wounds remaining. If your unit is a MONSTER unit, one model in your unit regains up to D3+1 lost wounds instead.
rows.timing_descriptor: your Command phase

rows.normalized_rule_text: WHEN: Any phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH unit (excluding MONSTER/VEHICLE units), or when a friendly LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH unit (excluding MONSTER/VEHICLE units) suffers a mortal wound. TARGET: That LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH unit. EFFECT: Select one other friendly LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH unit that is within 9" of and visible to your unit. Until the end of the phase, while the selected unit is on the battlefield, each time a model in your unit would lose a wound, inflict 1 mortal wound on the selected unit instead.
rows.raw_rule_text: WHEN: Any phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH unit (excluding MONSTER/VEHICLE units), or when a friendly LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH unit (excluding MONSTER/VEHICLE units) suffers a mortal wound. TARGET: That LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH unit. EFFECT: Select one other friendly LEGIONES DAEMONICA SLAANESH unit that is within 9" of and visible to your unit. Until the end of the phase, while the selected unit is on the battlefield, each time a model in your unit would lose a wound, inflict 1 mortal wound on the selected unit instead.
rows.timing_descriptor: any phase when the target is selected or suffers a mortal wound

rows.normalized_rule_text: LEGIONES DAEMONICA TZEENTCH MONSTER model only. In your Shooting phase, when this unit is selected to shoot, while an enemy unit is visible to a friendly LEGIONES DAEMONICA TZEENTCH unit, that enemy unit has +9" Detection Range until this unit has shot.
rows.raw_rule_text: LEGIONES DAEMONICA TZEENTCH MONSTER model only. In your Shooting phase, when this unit is selected to shoot, while an enemy unit is visible to a friendly LEGIONES DAEMONICA TZEENTCH unit, that enemy unit has +9" detection range until this unit has shot.
rows.timing_descriptor: your Shooting phase when this unit is selected to shoot

rows.normalized_rule_text: In your Shooting phase, when a friendly HERETIC ASTARTES PSYKER unit (excluding DAEMON units) is selected to shoot, if that unit makes a Dark Pact, that unit's ranged attacks have +1 Strength. In the Fight phase, when a friendly HERETIC ASTARTES DAEMON PRINCE or DAEMON PRINCE WITH WINGS unit (excluding KHORNE units) is selected to fight, if that unit makes a Dark Pact, that unit's melee attacks have +2 Strength and +1 Armour Penetration.
rows.raw_rule_text: In your Shooting phase, when a friendly HERETIC ASTARTES PSYKER unit (excluding DAEMON units) is selected to shoot, if that unit makes a Dark Pact, that unit's ranged attacks have +1 Strength. In the Fight phase, when a friendly HERETIC ASTARTES DAEMON PRINCE or DAEMON PRINCE WITH WINGS unit (excluding KHORNE units) is selected to fight, if that unit makes a Dark Pact, that unit's melee attacks have +2 Strength and +1 Armour Penetration.
rows.timing_descriptor: your Shooting phase or either Fight phase when an eligible unit is selected

rows.normalized_rule_text: CHAOS LORD JUMP PACK model only. Models in the bearer's unit have the Scouts 6" ability.
rows.raw_rule_text: CHAOS LORD JUMP PACK model only. Models in the bearer's unit have the Scouts 6" ability.

rows.normalized_rule_text: When a friendly EMPEROR'S CHILDREN BATTLELINE unit is selected to make an Advance or Fall Back move, that unit's attacks have +1 Strength until the end of the turn.
rows.raw_rule_text: When a friendly EMPEROR'S CHILDREN BATTLELINE unit is selected to make an Advance or Fall Back move, that unit's attacks have +1 Strength until the end of the turn.
rows.timing_descriptor: when an eligible unit is selected to Advance or Fall Back

rows.normalized_rule_text: In your Shooting phase, when a friendly INTERCEPTOR SQUAD unit has shot, you can use this ability. If you do, that unit cannot use its Personal Teleporters ability and that unit can make a surge move of up to D6+1".
rows.raw_rule_text: In your Shooting phase, when a friendly INTERCEPTOR SQUAD unit has shot, you can use this ability. If you do, that unit cannot use its Personal Teleporters ability and that unit can make a surge move of up to D6+1".
rows.timing_descriptor: your Shooting phase after an Interceptor Squad has shot

rows.normalized_rule_text: IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model only. (Once per battle, per army) At the end of your opponent's turn, if this unit is unengaged, you can use this ability. If you do, place this unit in Strategic Reserves. This unit has Deep Strike until the start of your next Shooting phase. This unit must make an ingress move in your next Movement phase (including in your first turn).
rows.raw_rule_text: IMPERIAL KNIGHTS model only. (Once per battle, per army) At the end of your opponent's turn, if this unit is unengaged, you can use this ability. If you do, place this unit in Strategic Reserves. This unit has Deep Strike until the start of your next Shooting phase. This unit must make an ingress move in your next Movement phase (including in your first turn).
rows.timing_descriptor: end of your opponent's turn

rows.normalized_rule_text: CRYPTEK model only. The bearer has the DESTROYER CULT keyword. Add 3" to the Move characteristic of the bearer.
rows.raw_rule_text: CRYPTEK model only. The bearer has the DESTROYER CULT keyword. Add 3" to the Move characteristic of the bearer.

rows.normalized_rule_text: TRANSCENDENT C'TAN model only. In your turn, when this unit makes an ingress or Advance move using its Transdimensional Displacement ability, this unit can end that move more than 6" horizontally from all enemy units. When this unit ends that move within 8" of an enemy unit, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge until the end of the turn.
rows.raw_rule_text: TRANSCENDENT C'TAN model only. In your turn, when this unit makes an ingress or Advance move using its Transdimensional Displacement ability, this unit can end that move more than 6" horizontally from all enemy units. When this unit ends that move within 8" of an enemy unit, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge until the end of the turn.
rows.timing_descriptor: your turn when using Transdimensional Displacement

rows.normalized_rule_text: In the Declare Battle Formations step, select up to three friendly MOB or KOMMANDOS units. Those units have Scouts 6" until the end of the battle.
rows.raw_rule_text: In the Declare Battle Formations step, select up to three friendly MOB or KOMMANDOS units. Those units have Scouts 6" until the end of the battle.
rows.timing_descriptor: Declare Battle Formations step

rows.normalized_rule_text: BEASTBOSS or INFANTRY WARBOSS model only. (Once per turn, per unit) In your opponent's Movement phase, when an enemy unit ends a move within 8" of this unit, if this unit is unengaged, this unit can make a Normal move of up to D3+3".
rows.raw_rule_text: BEASTBOSS or INFANTRY WARBOSS model only. (Once per turn, per unit) In your opponent's Movement phase, when an enemy unit ends a move within 8" of this unit, if this unit is unengaged, this unit can make a Normal move of up to D3+3".
rows.timing_descriptor: opponent's Movement phase after an enemy move

rows.normalized_rule_text: BEASTBOSS or INFANTRY WARBOSS model only. When this model is destroyed, if this unit has not been selected to fight this phase, roll one D6, with +1 to that roll if the Waaagh! is active for this unit. On a 3+, do not remove this model from the battlefield. When this unit has fought, or at the end of the phase, whichever comes first, this model is removed from the battlefield.
rows.raw_rule_text: BEASTBOSS or INFANTRY WARBOSS model only. When this model is destroyed, if this unit has not been selected to fight this phase, roll one D6, with +1 to that roll if the Waaagh! is active for this unit. On a 3+, do not remove this model from the battlefield. When this unit has fought, or at the end of the phase, whichever comes first, this model is removed from the battlefield.
rows.timing_descriptor: when the model is destroyed before its unit fights

rows.normalized_rule_text: WHEN: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase. TARGET: One friendly hidden MOB or KOMMANDOS unit selected to shoot or fight. EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, attacks made by models in your unit have Lethal Hits.
rows.raw_rule_text: WHEN: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase. TARGET: One friendly hidden MOB or KOMMANDOS unit selected to shoot or fight. EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, attacks made by models in your unit have Lethal Hits.
rows.timing_descriptor: your Shooting phase or either Fight phase

rows.normalized_rule_text: WHEN: Your Command phase. TARGET: One friendly MOB or KOMMANDOS unit. EFFECT: One model in your unit regains up to 2D3 lost wounds.
rows.raw_rule_text: WHEN: Your Command phase. TARGET: One friendly MOB or KOMMANDOS unit. EFFECT: One model in your unit regains up to 2D3 lost wounds.
rows.timing_descriptor: your Command phase

rows.normalized_rule_text: WHEN: Start of your Shooting phase. TARGET: One friendly MOB or KOMMANDOS unit. EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, while a visible enemy unit is within 6" of your unit, that enemy unit has +3" Detection Range.
rows.raw_rule_text: WHEN: Start of your Shooting phase. TARGET: One friendly MOB or KOMMANDOS unit. EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, while a visible enemy unit is within 6" of your unit, that enemy unit has +3" detection range.
rows.timing_descriptor: start of your Shooting phase

rows.normalized_rule_text: In a turn in which a friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES FLY INFANTRY unit made an ingress or Charge move, that unit's attacks can re-roll hit rolls of 1.
rows.raw_rule_text: In a turn in which a friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES FLY INFANTRY unit made an ingress or Charge move, that unit's attacks can re-roll hit rolls of 1.
rows.timing_descriptor: turn in which the unit made an ingress or Charge move

rows.normalized_rule_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES FLY INFANTRY model only. When this unit ends an ingress move, select up to one enemy unit within 9" of this unit. That enemy unit makes a Battle-shock roll, with -1 to that Battle-shock roll.
rows.raw_rule_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES FLY INFANTRY model only. When this unit ends an ingress move, select up to one enemy unit within 9" of this unit. That enemy unit makes a Battle-shock roll, with -1 to that Battle-shock roll.
rows.timing_descriptor: when this unit ends an ingress move

rows.normalized_rule_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES FLY INFANTRY model only. This model has the following weapon: Orksbane [Cleave 2]; Range Melee, Attacks 4, Weapon Skill 2+, Strength 8, Armour Penetration -2, Damage 3.
rows.raw_rule_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES FLY INFANTRY model only. This model has the following weapon: Orksbane [CLEAVE 2]; Range Melee, Attacks 4, Weapon Skill 2+, Strength 8, Armour Penetration -2, Damage 3.

rows.normalized_rule_text: WHEN: Fight phase, when a friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES FLY INFANTRY unit that made a Charge move this turn is selected to fight. TARGET: That unit. EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, that unit's melee attacks have +1 Strength.
rows.raw_rule_text: WHEN: Fight phase, when a friendly ADEPTUS ASTARTES FLY INFANTRY unit that made a Charge move this turn is selected to fight. TARGET: That unit. EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, that unit's melee attacks have +1 Strength.
rows.timing_descriptor: Fight phase when a charging unit is selected to fight

rows.normalized_rule_text: WHEN: End of the Fight phase. TARGET: One friendly unengaged ADEPTUS ASTARTES FLY INFANTRY unit that is eligible to fight. EFFECT: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D3+3".
rows.raw_rule_text: WHEN: End of the Fight phase. TARGET: One friendly unengaged ADEPTUS ASTARTES FLY INFANTRY unit that is eligible to fight. EFFECT: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D3+3".
rows.timing_descriptor: end of the Fight phase

rows.normalized_rule_text: WHEN: Your Command phase. TARGET: One friendly Battle-shocked ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit. You can target that unit even though it is Battle-shocked. EFFECT: Your unit is no longer Battle-shocked.
rows.raw_rule_text: WHEN: Your Command phase. TARGET: One friendly Battle-shocked ADEPTUS ASTARTES unit. You can target that unit even though it is Battle-shocked. EFFECT: Your unit is no longer Battle-shocked.
rows.timing_descriptor: your Command phase

rows.normalized_rule_text: WHEN: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets. TARGET: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED or FLY VEHICLE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more attacks. EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, subtract 1 from wound rolls for attacks that target your unit.
rows.raw_rule_text: WHEN: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets. TARGET: One ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED or FLY VEHICLE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more attacks. EFFECT: Until the end of the phase, subtract 1 from wound rolls for attacks that target your unit.
rows.timing_descriptor: opponent's Shooting phase after targets are selected

rows.normalized_rule_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES PSYKER model only. This unit's ranged attacks have Lethal Hits. If this unit has the Pyromancy Discipline ability, those attacks also have Sustained Hits 1.
rows.raw_rule_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES PSYKER model only. This unit's ranged attacks have Lethal Hits. If this unit has the Pyromancy Discipline ability, those attacks also have Sustained Hits 1.

rows.normalized_rule_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES PSYKER model only. If this unit has the Telekinesis Discipline ability, this unit has Deep Strike. At the end of your opponent's Fight phase, if this unit is unengaged, you can place this unit in Strategic Reserves. This unit can make an ingress move in your next Movement phase (including in your first turn).
rows.raw_rule_text: ADEPTUS ASTARTES PSYKER model only. If this unit has the Telekinesis Discipline ability, this unit has Deep Strike. At the end of your opponent's Fight phase, if this unit is unengaged, you can place this unit in Strategic Reserves. This unit can make an ingress move in your next Movement phase (including in your first turn).
rows.timing_descriptor: end of your opponent's Fight phase

rows.normalized_rule_text: INFANTRY or MOUNTED THOUSAND SONS PSYKER model only. (Once per battle, per army) When this model is destroyed, at the end of the phase, roll one D6. On a 2+, set up this model on the battlefield, unengaged and as close as possible to where it was destroyed. This model is not part of an Attached unit and its unit has a Starting Strength of 1. This model has 3 wounds remaining.
rows.raw_rule_text: INFANTRY or MOUNTED THOUSAND SONS PSYKER model only. (Once per battle, per army) When this model is destroyed, at the end of the phase, roll one D6. On a 2+, set up this model on the battlefield, unengaged and as close as possible to where it was destroyed. This model is not part of an Attached unit and its unit has a Starting Strength of 1. This model has 3 wounds remaining.
rows.timing_descriptor: end of the phase in which this model was destroyed

rows.normalized_rule_text: WHEN: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets. TARGET: One THOUSAND SONS PSYKER unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks. EFFECT: Your unit has Stealth. If your unit is wholly within your army's Flow of Magic, your unit has -3" Detection Range.
rows.raw_rule_text: WHEN: Your opponent's Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets. TARGET: One THOUSAND SONS PSYKER unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit's attacks. EFFECT: Your unit has Stealth. If your unit is wholly within your army's Flow of Magic, your unit has -3" detection range.
rows.timing_descriptor: opponent's Shooting phase after targets are selected

rows.normalized_rule_text: This Order can only be issued to ARMOURED SKIRMISHER units. Each time an enemy unit ends a Normal or Advance move within 8" of this unit, this unit can make a Normal move of up to D6". Each unit can only move in this way once per turn.
rows.raw_rule_text: This Order can only be issued to ARMOURED SKIRMISHER units. Each time an enemy unit ends a Normal or Advance move within 8" of this unit, this unit can make a Normal move of up to D6". Each unit can only move in this way once per turn.
rows.timing_descriptor: after an enemy Normal or Advance move within 8 inches
